programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A woman agrees to be an alien test subject only to lose her mind with loneliness

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A salesman comes between a husband and wife having a spat in the hotel room next door

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A young football star begins to have nightmares about a serial killer called The Springwood Chopper after finding his last victim Each dream reveals more of the killer until he is blamed for the killings Now his girlfriend begins to experience the same dreamswho is the killer

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A boy discovers a toy in a cereal box that miraculously comes to life as a mischievous reptile

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: Following a blow to the head Alexs nightmares appear to be becoming reality His girlfriend asks a psychologist for help and he suggests for Alex to enter the dream world and face his subconsciousness

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 1
programme.desc: Part 1 Dien Bien Phu - The Legacy

programme.title: Dogfight - The Mystery of the Red Baron
programme.desc: The corpse-lined trenches of Northern France are well known as one of the deadliest killing grounds of World War I In fact proportionatly an even more lethal war was taking place in the skies over Europe The worlds first flying aces were regarded as the cosseted glamour boys of The Great War But by 1917 the life expectancy of a new pilot was just two weeks

programme.title: Armistice - The End Game of WW1
programme.desc: Professor David Reynolds uncovers a story of wounded egos political scheming and strategy behind the lines as statesmen and generals haggled over the terms of peace while the soldiers fought on the front-line

programme.title: The Forgotten War Between Britain And The USA
programme.desc: In June 1812 the United States of America declared war on Britain and invaded its colony of Upper Canada Britain was already locked in a life and death struggle with Napoleon in Europe leaving Upper Canada poorly defended and vulnerable to attack

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt4
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: Costly defeats made possible by commanders who disastrously underestimated their enemies

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A cop learns that an illustrator of Tales from the Crypt might have the power to make his monstrous creations come to life due to his shrewish wife

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Enoch the two-faced man an attraction at a sideshow falls in love with a 4000 year old mummy eventually leading up to the conception of their bastard child The Crypt Keeper

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: In this black comedy desperate real estate salesman Jake McElhaney tries to convince a magicians strange attractive twin daughters Frances and Priscilla Packard to sell their house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome audio engineer Eric Dunlap hired to install his strange top notch sound system with a mind of its own for an egotistical music conductor Kurt Hoffman but falls hard for Hoffmans beautiful neglected wife Veronica

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A model uses a cursed compact to dispose of anyone who stands in the way of her success including her doctor and her lover

programme.title: Mchale 305
programme.desc: Mchale 305

programme.title: Mchale 228
programme.desc: Mchale 228

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Troy is captured while trying to make contact with the underground in a small village At stake is micro-film information about a new type of bomb the Germans have developed

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer decides to find a girl of his own after meeting Sergeant Carters girlfriend

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A lost crate containing a top-secret clay that can be converted to explosives washes up on the island Not knowing what it is they make several items with it--including Gilligans new tooth fillings

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke is set up by a traveling show to take part in a boxing match Kate objects which leaves Grandpa to defend the McCoy family honor

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George opens a gas station and he makes the mistake of hiring Amos

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max enters the world of art looking for an art thief know as Bronzefinger

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS is using parrots to learn secret formulas and then KAOS smuggles them out of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Deputy Perkins serves BJ a subpoena too appear in court to testify against sheriff Lobo During the trial BJ is arrested Lobo lets BJ escape and tells him to leave town BJ doesnt leave town but instead helps to stop Harry Cunningham who is cutting cost on a dam project by diluting cement

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger wants to get out of having to take a trip to San Francisco with Kay and The Posts so he tricks Wilbur into believing that Mister Ed is suddenly going bald which in turn makes Ed a nervous wreck

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans 310
programme.desc: Hogans 310

programme.title: Hogans 303
programme.desc: Hogans 303

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: George Babyface Nelson became one of the most important gangsters of 1930s Chicago by making brutal robberies In order to compete with Al Capone he allied himself with John Dillinger

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An old business partner of Augurs is hired by Daan to get information about the Resistance resulting in the death of many members Meanwhile Sandoval finds out he has a life threatening blood disorder

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two of Tressas friends are trapped in an invisible stealth shield developed by Dr Arcane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: With Maya now a crew member the Alphans discover a young couple called Cantor and Zova who have been in suspended animation for some while They claim that they are exiles from the planet Golos following an invasion and ask for the help of Alphan crew members to recover the rest of their comrades who are trapped in missile-like canisters in orbit around the moon Helena and Tony convince Koenig that the alien couple are innocent beings and allow them the chance to recover their people However Cantor and Zova abduct Helena and Tony transporting them to the planet Golos where it is apparent that they are not the young innocents they appeared to be

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes partner leaves on private business When he doesnt return Cheyenne follows him to determine what happened Cheyenne finds him in jail where he is shot Cheyenne finds himself in a mess related to an estate and lawyer

programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: When the IMFs original scheme to free an elderly cardinal from an inescapable prison in a fictional Eastern European country goes awry the team must concoct a new plan to get him out of solitary confinement

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is captured by Lt Gerard while traveling with a group of migrant workers During a violent wind storm Gerard is badly injured and Kimble has to convince the others to help him save Gerards life

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A young concert violinist virtuoso begins to buckle under both the strain of performing and the demands of his authoritative manager Max himself a former violinist Kimble suspects he might resort to a desperate act to rid himself of Max

programme.desc: The festive fun of the annual Mardi Gras celebration is brought to a halt when a swarm of African killer bees escape from a foreign freighter

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Guardians must defeat the invading aliens as well as the Renegades

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Nick Matt and AJ are kidnapped at the heart of Gobotron but when they escape the Renegades they fall into the hands of Wrecks the leader of a gang of thieves who enters Matt in a bizarre form of gladiatorial combat

programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root is starting to wither and the only cure for it is a dose of the ion winds on Solarus II a planet controlled by Saw Boss He destroyed the Solarian people and now uses the healing powers of the winds for his vines

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While stopping on a dead planet looking for Audric the Lightning League crosses path with one of the Vizani a gardener named Faro who with a few seeds and his own power brings life to the planet Saw Boss witnesses this transformation

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Thrity years ago Andrew Trakker received a valuable crystal from a tribe of New Guinea mud-men Now having learned the secret of its power and used it to benefit mankind Andrews son Matt is returning it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An ancient crystal skull is stolen during an auction By looking through it Miles Mayhem learns Matt Trakkers identity as the leader of MASK and blackmails him into giving up the rest of his secrets and technology

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain sets a trap by showing the N team she is defeated and also opens up a warp zone with Kevins neighborhood shown on the other side Foolishly Kevin goes through and the members of his team are captured and banished to the Black Hole Warp Zone Kevin realizes hes actually on Metroid Then he succeeds into getting back to the Palace and rescuing the N team

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: On his birthday Mega Man really wishes to become human So he is ready to pass the Three Challenges to accomplish humanity

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap
